calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Release And Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Brown appeared by zoom for and with Carla Flores (trustee) by zoom and Anita Murillo (beneficiary) by zoom.
Ian Durdle appeared by zoom for and with Helen Lopez (suspended trustee/petitioner) by zoom.

Discussion was held regarding the manner in which Anita's signature appeared on the settlement agreement. No one present objects to the court approving the settlement agreement. The Petition for Approval of Release and Settlement Agreement is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. The court stated that it will sign the stipulation regarding retention of jurisdiction pursuant to CCP 664.6. The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Compel Status Report and Account, the Petition for Settlement of First and Final Account, etc., and status of mediation are off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Continued To Dec-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Jennifer Brown, Esq. for Anita Murillo (Petitioner) and Carla Murillo Flores (Temporary Trustee);
David Mansour, Esq. for Helen Lopez (Petitioner/Respondent).

The Court inquired about Anita Murillo and the status of mediation. Ms. Brown reported that Anita Murillo is doing well, that the parties were able to work out the one remaining issue, and that there is a tentative agreement. Mr. Mansour stated that they will petition for approval of the settlement agreement and requested a continuance of 45-60 days. The Court commended the parties on reaching a resolution.

The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Compel Status Report and Account, the Petition for Settlement of First Accounting and Report of Suspended Trustee, and Status Hearing on Mediation are continued to December 11, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Cabrera. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Continued To Sep-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jennifer Lynne Brown, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Objector/Temporary Trustee Carla Murillo Flores, present via Zoom, and also appearing for Objector/Petitioner Anita Murillo, not present.
David Mansour, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Petitioner/Suspended Trustee Helen Lopez, via Zoom.

Mrs. Brown stated that she can't verify the trust transaction for $181,000.00, that the Chattanooga property was sold to pay for Mrs. Murillo's care and her debt, that trust assets were used to pay for expenditures and that she commingled funds with her personal assets. Mr. Mansour stated that both parties agreed to mediation but never attended, that he would like a Breslin order issued. The Court will issue an order for mediation. The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Compel Status Report and Account and the Petition for Settlement of First Accounting and Report of Suspended Trustee are continued to September 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Status on mediation is also set for September 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A joint mediation statement is due on September 18, 2023.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Maloney: Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To Jun-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jennfer Lynne Brown, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Objector/Temporary Trustee Carla Murillo Flores, present via Zoom, and also appearing for Objector/Petitioner Anita Murillo, not present.
David Mansour, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Petitioner/Suspended Trustee Helen Lopez, via Zoom.
Interested Party Patricia Murillo, via Zoom.

The Court addressed the petitions, stated that Mr. Monsour responded to the examiner's notes, that his declaration is currently pending in the court's e-filing queue, and that a continuance is being requested to allow the parties time to attempt to reach a settlement. Mr. Monsour informed the Court that his declaration was just e-filed. Ms. Brown stated that the parties will participate in mediation, that she agrees with the probate examiner and that a probate referee should be appointed, and that she petitioned for records which she hopes will be provided via a pdf. Mr. Monsour stated that a probate referee is not necessary, that the properties were properly appraised, that one of the properties was sold, and that the information is attached to his declaration. Mr. Monsour addressed Ms. Brown's request for records stating that he needs to go through what Ms. Brown has and will then provide her with the rest. Ms. Brown stated that they don't think that the appraisals are correct and that the duplex in the Mission was appraised at $850,000.00. Mr. Monsour stated that the $850,000.00 only reflected the 50% trust ownership of the Mission duplex. Ms. Brown stated that she was not aware of that information.

At the conclusion of comments, the Court stated that it is a non-controversial request and stated that it would appoint a probate referee. The Court also stated that it trusts that Mr. Monsour will get the records to Ms. Brown in a week. Ms. Brown stated that working with Mr. Monsour has been quite pleasant. Mr. Monsour inquired about the inventory on all four properties or just the Dolores property. The Court stated that the parties should continue their dialogue and that there would be a probate referee in place if needed.

The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Compel Status Report and Account and the Petition for Settlement of First Accounting and Report of Suspended Trustee are continued to June 7, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Status on mediation is also set for June 7, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A joint mediation statement is due one week before June 7, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Cho. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Compel Status Report And Account
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer L. Brown, via Zoom, for and with Anita Murillo, Petitioner; David Monsour, via Zoom, for Helen Lopez, Objector.

Mr. Monsour reports that all liquid assets have been ceded to Ms. Brown but that he has some concerns with the transfer of the real property held in the Trust to temporary trustee Carla Murillo Flores as his client is unable to execute any deeds as trustee to effectuate said transfers due to her suspension. Ms. Brown reports that she shares Mr. Monsour's concern's and that it is her belief that Ms. Lopez does not have authority to execute the subject deeds since she is suspended. Mr. Monsour reports that an accounting should be filed by the end of this week and points to his declaration pending in the court's e-filing queue. The court acknowledges counsel's efforts with this matter but also points to its concerns with the delays in resolving this matter. The court suggests that counsel meet and confer regarding possibly submitting and order after hearing to the court for its consideration and execution, to help move this matter forward. Mr. Monsour is instructed to file and serve his accounting by Dec-13-2022. The court advises that it will not impose sanctions on Ms. Lopez at this time.

The subject matters are continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Compel Status Report And Account
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Brown, via Zoom, for Anita Murillo, Petitioner; Suzanne McDonnell, via Zoom, for and with Helen Lopez, Objector; Carla Murillo, via Zoom, in propria persona, interested Party.

Ms. McDonnell reports that personal health issues have caused delays in providing an accounting and that the person working with her to finalize the accounting has been on vacation. Ms. McDonnell reports on additional efforts to comply with instructions the court gave at the last hearing and confirms her intent to substitute-out as attorney of record for Ms. Lopez and reports on her client's ongoing search for new counsel. The court confirms with Ms. McDonnell that Ms. Brown's client has not received any relief under the related Special Needs Trust (SNT). Ms. Brown offers her sympathies for Ms. McDonnell's health issues and offers her position regarding the SNT issue and that the delays with that matter and this matter are very concerning and points the court to Carla Murillo's willingness to serve as successor Trustee. The court confirms with Carla Murillo that she is willing to serve as successor Trustee. After additional discussion, the court acknowledges that the Objector's actions up to this point appear to be tactics to stall this matter and advises that it is suspending Helen Lopez as Trustee forthwith and appoints Carla Murillo as successor Trustee in open court.

The matters set for hearing are continued to Dec-05-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on the Filing of Suspended Trustee's Report and Accounting is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Continued To Dec-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Compel Status Report And Account
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Continued To Sep-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer L. Brown, via Zoom, for Anita Murillo, Petitioner; Suzanne McDonnell, via Zoom for Helen F. Lopez, Trustee.

The court confirms with counsel that the matter qualifies for pro bono mediation. Ms. McDowell advises that she'd prefer that the court allow the parties to discuss settlement on their own and if needed, order the parties to attend mediation. Ms. Brown advises that previous attempts to meet and confer have been unproductive and asks that the court order the parties to mediation now. The court offers its position with this matter and of the seeming lack of movement of the successor Trustee in funding a sub-trust for the beneficiary. Ms. McDowell offers advocacy for her client and reports of the issues that her client has been dealing with since the Trustor's death. Ms. McDowell requests to meet and confer at the real property so that her client can examine the property and have a better idea of what repairs are required. Ms. Brown requests that due to her clients age, she be allowed to meet via Zoom instead of in-person. Ms. Brown also requests an Inventory and Appraisal and a list of assets. Ms. McDowell advises that she can provide the asset list within ten (10) days and asks that the court give her until the first week of November to provide an accounting. The court orders the parties to continue to meet and confer. The court will be continuing this matter and advises that it will be considering the possibility of referring the matter to mediation at the next hearing date.

The matter is continued to Sep-28-2022 at 9:00 am. A Status of Accounting is added to the same date.


Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
